scenarios.description: parseInput(String,baseUri) with valid HTML returns a Document containing expected elements
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput string overload valid HTML
Document doc = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()).parseInput(html, baseUri);

scenarios.description: parseInput(String,baseUri) with empty HTML returns an empty Document body
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parseInput string overload empty HTML
Document doc = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()).parseInput(html, baseUri);

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader,baseUri) with valid Reader returns same content Document
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parseInput reader overload valid HTML
Document doc = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()).parseInput(reader, baseUri);

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader,baseUri) wraps IOException from Reader into UncheckedIOException
scenarios.precondition: Reader stub throws IOException on read to simulate I/O error
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput reader overload reader error
Reader reader = new Reader(){ public int read(char[] c, int off, int len) throws IOException { throw new IOException("fail"); } public void close(){} };
